feature_descriptions.dh_group: encoded Diffie-Hellman group (low groups = weak / downgrade)
feature_descriptions.init_rate: SA-init / main-mode starts per source over the window (brute force / DoS)
feature_descriptions.notify_fail_rate: error / notify (AUTHENTICATION_FAILED, NO_PROPOSAL_CHOSEN) per source over the window
feature_descriptions.vendor_id: frequency-encoded vendor ID (fingerprints the VPN implementation)
feature_descriptions.weak_proposal: boolean: any proposed algorithm is weak / deprecated

schema_description: (batch) Suricata IKE/ISAKMP set: version, exchange type, proposed crypto, negotiation rates, vendor ID
